headline: Oil prices rise 3% as Iran rejects direct U.S. talks despite proposal review
summary: Oil prices rose after Iran signaled it had no intention of holding direct talks with the United States.

headline: S&P 500 falls as oil jumps and Trump warns Iran negotiators to 'get serious': Live updates
summary: On Wednesday, the major averages rose on traders' hopes that there would soon be a resolution to the conflict in the Middle East.

headline: Why Raymond James Sees Marathon Petroleum Reaching $270
summary: Marathon Petroleum Corp. (NYSE:MPC) has been a standout energy sector performer, with shares up nearly 25% over the past month and nearly 48% year to date. The stock is trading around $244 on March 25, not far off its 52-week high of $247.14. The Street’s average price target sits at $212.83 across 10 buy and 9 ... Why Raymond James Sees Marathon Petroleum Reaching $270

headline: Raymond James Maintains Outperform on Marathon Petroleum, Raises Price Target to $270
summary: Raymond James  analyst Justin Jenkins   maintains Marathon Petroleum (NYSE:MPC) with a Outperform and raises the price target from $210 to $270.

headline: Trump administration waives summer gasoline regulations to address surging fuel prices
summary: EPA Administrator Lee Zeldin said the waivers will help prevent a fuel supply disruption in the U.S. during the Iran war.

headline: Marathon Petroleum Meeting Puts Governance Changes And Shareholder Influence In Focus
summary: Marathon Petroleum (NYSE:MPC) has set the date for its 2026 Annual Meeting of Shareholders. The meeting agenda includes a proposed amendment to the company’s Certificate of Incorporation. The amendment is expected to address elements of corporate governance that affect shareholder rights and company procedures. For investors tracking NYSE:MPC, the timing of this announcement comes with the stock at a share price of $243.91 and a value score of 4. Over recent periods, the stock has recorded...
